video_title: The Parabolic Seven & IBM's Warning To The World

Yeah, it would be great to to hear him again sometime. Yeah, he's amazing force, amazing knowledgeable guy on on the markets, for sure. >> Well, it's funny you tell that story cuz I had heard similar uh over the years and I was always somewhat incredulous, but you know, as as the years go by, you learn that more and more people actually do watch the show. So, when somebody like you watches it, it's it's high praise, for sure. So, let's get into it real quick because we're doing this on a Tuesday afternoon, Kevin Warsh testifying. He he um, you know, in that testimony, he put a lot of emphasis on price stability. And that's pretty strong guidance. We saw the reaction in the markets, right? So, I think Warsh wants to move really away from that. So, we may not see these type of speeches anymore from Waller's and as a practical example what happened yesterday. >> What what sort of I mean, does he have that sort of power over speakers like that? They spending faster on it than it than they spend maybe on basics, right? Let's say say gas or food.
